title: solanum nigrum subsp. dillenii
intro: Solanum nigrum subsp. dillenii, also known as Dilleni's black nightshade or black nightshade, is a subspecies of the Solanum nigrum plant, a flowering plant in the Solanaceae family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Solanum nigrum subsp. dillenii include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Solanum nigrum subsp. dillenii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves, stems, and roots in hot water or a solvent.
